mapper.insert: INSERT INTO worker_report_outbox ( tenant_id, task_id, partition_invocation_id, trace_id, payload_json, publish_status, attempt_count, next_attempt_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.taskId}, #{p.partitionInvocationId}, #{p.traceId}, #{p.payloadJson}, #{p.publishStatus}, 0, #{p.nextAttemptAt}, #{p.createdAt}, #{p.updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT(tenant_id, task_id) DO UPDATE SET partition_invocation_id = excluded.partition_invocation_id, trace_id = excluded.trace_id, payload_json = excluded.payload_json, publish_status = excluded.publish_status, attempt_count = 0, next_attempt_at = excluded.next_attempt_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT attempt_count FROM worker_report_outbox WHERE id = #{id}
